western_signs.name: Aries
western_signs.blurb: Bold, impulsive, driven by instinct and initiation.

western_signs.name: Taurus
western_signs.blurb: Grounded, steady, values stability and persistence.

western_signs.name: Gemini
western_signs.blurb: Curious, witty, thrives on communication and change.

western_signs.name: Cancer
western_signs.blurb: Nurturing, protective, deeply intuitive and emotional.

western_signs.name: Leo
western_signs.blurb: Charismatic, warm, shines in leadership and loyalty.

western_signs.name: Virgo
western_signs.blurb: Analytical, reserved, values order and quiet strength.

verification.note: Matches tradition; conventional sources also emphasize practical and service-oriented, absent here. Omission, not error.

western_signs.name: Scorpio
western_signs.blurb: Intense, private, emotionally deep and discerning.

western_signs.name: Sagittarius
western_signs.blurb: Adventurous, idealistic, thrives on truth and freedom.

western_signs.name: Capricorn
western_signs.blurb: Disciplined, structured, values work and long-term goals.

western_signs.name: Aquarius
western_signs.blurb: Innovative, unconventional, values vision and independence.

western_signs.name: Pisces
western_signs.blurb: Dreamy, artistic, deeply empathetic and emotionally complex.

chinese_animals.name: Ox
chinese_animals.blurb: Strong, patient, determined in quiet ways.

chinese_animals.name: Tiger
chinese_animals.blurb: Brave, competitive, born to lead or rebel.

chinese_animals.name: Rabbit
chinese_animals.blurb: Gentle, intuitive, sensitive to emotion and beauty.

chinese_animals.name: Dragon
chinese_animals.blurb: Dynamic, proud, built for transformation and risk.

verification.note: "Built for transformation and risk" is interpretive; traditional core is confident, ambitious, energetic. Consistent.

chinese_animals.name: Snake
chinese_animals.blurb: Wise, strategic, holds knowledge like a weapon.

verification.note: Core (wise, strategic, intuitive) matches tradition; "holds knowledge like a weapon" is an edgier shading than the traditional enigmatic/refined archetype. Accurate base, stylistic choice flagged.

chinese_animals.name: Horse
chinese_animals.blurb: Energetic, free-spirited, often restless but loyal.

chinese_animals.name: Goat
chinese_animals.blurb: Kind, creative, thrives in calm and beauty.

chinese_animals.name: Monkey
chinese_animals.blurb: Playful, curious, thrives in chaos and invention.

chinese_animals.name: Rooster
chinese_animals.blurb: Observant, blunt, speaks truth without apology.

chinese_animals.name: Dog
chinese_animals.blurb: Loyal, just, thrives in service and protection.

chinese_animals.name: Pig
traits: finds strength in softness and care
chinese_animals.blurb: Joyful, sincere, finds strength in softness and care.

chinese_elements.name: Wood
chinese_elements.blurb: Wood reaches toward the light. Wood people grow through connection, stretch past old limits, and bring others along as they rise.
chinese_elements.flavor_clause: steadied by Wood’s patient growth toward the light

verification.note: Traits corroborated against multiple Wu Xing personality references; wording remains Claude draft pending your voice edit.

chinese_elements.name: Fire
chinese_elements.blurb: Fire moves first and warms the room. Fire people carry momentum, spark courage in others, and turn intention into motion.
chinese_elements.flavor_clause: lit by Fire’s warmth and momentum

verification.note: Traits corroborated against multiple Wu Xing personality references; wording remains Claude draft pending your voice edit.

chinese_elements.name: Earth
chinese_elements.blurb: Earth holds the center. Earth people offer steady ground, keep their word, and make room for others to rest and rebuild.
chinese_elements.flavor_clause: held by Earth’s steady, patient ground

verification.note: Traits corroborated against multiple Wu Xing personality references; wording remains Claude draft pending your voice edit.

chinese_elements.name: Metal
chinese_elements.blurb: Metal keeps its edge. Metal people value clarity, follow through with quiet resolve, and cut through noise to what matters.

verification.note: Traits corroborated against multiple Wu Xing personality references; wording remains Claude draft pending your voice edit.

chinese_elements.name: Water
chinese_elements.blurb: Water finds the way through. Water people read the currents beneath the surface, adapt without losing themselves, and carry deep wisdom lightly.

verification.note: Traits corroborated against multiple Wu Xing personality references; wording remains Claude draft pending your voice edit.
